\tzpentry{ID3845}{Twist Phase Angle Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3845 introduces Twist Phase Angle Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
\(\theta_{\text{twist}} = \frac{2\pi}{\lambda}\tan\alpha\)
\]
